heading: Funds of Secretary of Housing and Urban Development
label: 1505 Funds of Secretary of Housing and Urban Development
text: The Secretary of Housing and Urban Development may use for the purposes of this subchapter any of the funds or authorizations heretofore or hereafter made available to it.
notes: Transfer of FunctionsFor transfer of functions to Secretary of Housing and Urban Development, see note set out under .section 1501 of this title

Provisions Inapplicable to This Subchapter, , provided in part: The provisions of title I of act , enacted section 1262a of former Title 10, Armed Forces, section 546e of former Title 34, Navy, and former sections 1151 to 1162 of the former Appendix to Title 50, War and National Defense, and amended section 40 of former Title 41, Public Contracts.Act June 28, 1940, ch. 440, title II, § 20554 Stat. 683“The provisions of title I of this Act shall not apply to this title [this subchapter].”June 28, 1940
